assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Welcome! Activate your account

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your payment was successful.

Set your password and activate your account here:

Activate account

This link expires on {{$json.expires_at}}.

Login: {{$json.login_url || 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/login'}}

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Welcome! Your Google account is ready

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your paid sign-up through Google is active.

You can continue by logging in with Google:

{{$json.login_url || 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/login'}}

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: You were invited to join the team

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

You were invited as a team member.

Use this setup link to accept the invite:

Accept invite

This link expires on {{$json.expires_at}}.

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Your customer portal is ready

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your customer portal access is ready.

Set your password here:

Set password

This link expires on {{$json.expires_at}}.

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Your setup link is expiring soon

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your setup link will expire soon.

Use it now:

Complete setup

Expires on {{$json.expires_at}}.

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Your setup link has expired

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your setup link has expired.

Please request a fresh setup email from the login page.

Login: {{$json.login_url || 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/login'}}

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Payment received

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
=

Hi {{$json.name}},

We received your payment successfully.

If your account is still pending activation, check your inbox for the setup email.

Login: {{$json.login_url || 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/login'}}

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: ={{$json.subject || 'Payment successful'}}

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
={{$json.html || '

Thank you. Your payment was received successfully.

'}}

assignments.name: tenant_id
assignments.value: ={{$json.tenant_id}}

assignments.name: lead_id
assignments.value: ={{$json.lead_id}}

assignments.name: source_campaign
assignments.value: ={{$json.source_campaign || ''}}

assignments.name: tenant_id
assignments.value: ={{$json.tenant_id}}

assignments.name: invoice_id
assignments.value: ={{$json.invoice_id || ''}}
